artifacts.summary: Design document specifying Lean structures for saturated BFMCS construction including ModalWitnessData, buildWitnessMCS, SaturatedCanonicalBFMCS, and integration guide for task 1003

completion_data.completion_summary: Created design document specifying Lean structures for modal witness infrastructure. Defined ModalWitnessData structure linking Diamond formulas to witness MCSes, buildWitnessMCS construction via Lindenbaum extension, SaturatedCanonicalBFMCS bundling saturation proof, and proof strategy using existing saturated_modal_backward theorem. Integration guide maps design to implementation files for task 1003.
